name: Sales
description: The Sales department is responsible for driving revenue growth through new customer acquisition, upselling existing accounts, and managing the full sales cycle from prospecting to close.
head: emp_1

name: Engineering
description: The Engineering department is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining product infrastructure, features, and integrations across web, mobile, and API surfaces.
head: emp_2

name: Customer Success
description: The Customer Success department is responsible for ensuring customer retention, adoption, and satisfaction through proactive outreach, health monitoring, and strategic account management.
head: emp_59

name: Marketing
description: The Marketing department is responsible for generating demand, building brand awareness, and nurturing leads through campaigns, content, events, and digital channels.
head: emp_54

name: Finance
description: The Finance department is responsible for managing company financials including budgeting, forecasting, reporting, accounts receivable, and investor relations.
head: emp_6

name: Human Resources
description: The Human Resources department is responsible for recruiting top talent, managing employee lifecycle, benefits administration, culture initiatives, and compliance.
head: emp_18

name: Operations
description: The Operations department is responsible for optimizing business processes, managing vendor relationships, facilities, and ensuring operational efficiency across the company.
head: emp_159

name: Product
description: The Product department is responsible for defining product strategy, prioritizing roadmap, working with engineering and customers to ship features that drive value.
head: emp_40

name: Legal
description: The Legal department is responsible for managing contracts, compliance, intellectual property, employment law, and corporate governance matters.
head: emp_19

name: Support
description: The Support department is responsible for providing technical and product support to customers through multiple channels including email, phone, and live chat.
head: emp_11
